name: Kwakiutl

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Kwak'wala (kwak1269).

notes: Skeleton. Northern Wakashan language of northern Vancouver Island and the adjacent British Columbia coast, written in the community (U'mista-style) practical orthography. Lateral obstruents (tł=[tɬ], dł, ł=[ɬ]), affricates ts/dz/ch, labialized kw/gw/xw and uvular q are mapped. Kwakʼwala has an extensive ejective/glottalized series marked by a raised apostrophe that this base map does not fuse, and schwa plus predictable stress are not recovered from spelling, giving a substantial PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Kwak'wala (kwak1269)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
